LanguageData.AutoDeathRest.EnabledTip: When enabled, pawns with the Deathrest gene automatically enter deathrest when their remaining cycle drops below the threshold.
LanguageData.AutoDeathRest.ThresholdLabel: Auto-deathrest when remaining need falls below: {0}%
LanguageData.AutoDeathRest.TriggerOnExhaustionTip: If a pawn develops the deathrest exhaustion hediff, force deathrest immediately regardless of the threshold.
LanguageData.AutoDeathRest.RequireOwnedBedTip: If checked, pawns will only auto-deathrest in a bed assigned to them. Otherwise the nearest available deathrest-capable bed is used.
LanguageData.AutoDeathRest.ShowNotificationTip: Post a letter in the top-right whenever auto-deathrest is triggered for a pawn.
LanguageData.AutoDeathRest.LetterText: {0} has started deathresting automatically. Remaining deathrest need: {1}%.
LanguageData.AutoDeathRest.LetterTextExhaustion: {0} has started deathresting automatically due to deathrest exhaustion.
LanguageData.AutoDeathRest.ForceAutoWakeTip: When auto-deathrest starts, also enable the gene's auto-wake flag so the pawn wakes up automatically once the deathrest cycle completes.
